text: Kinesis Concepts @ ctmanste. @ wroret ¢ Kinesis is a scalable streaming service * Producers send data into a kinesis stream e Streams can scale from low to near infinite data rates e Public service & highly available by design e Streams store a 24-hour moving window of data e ... can be increased to a maximum of 365 days (additional cost) e Multiple consumers access data from that moving window
